tasks.title: pensieve: Activate Gmail capture workflow in n8n

mvp_template.doel: Build an n8n workflow that monitors a Gmail inbox (label or address) and captures matching emails as notes into the Obsidian vault on Pi4, using the same YAML frontmatter template as the Telegram capture workflow.
niet_in_scope: email archiving or deletion in Gmail
acceptatiecriteria: n8n workflow JSON produced and importable on Pi4 without SQLITE_CONSTRAINT errors
Workflow triggers on Gmail label or sender filter (configurable via env var or n8n credential)
Email body/subject parsed and passed to Claude API (Haiku) for summary + tags + topic
Output written to vault as YAML frontmatter note matching current template (source:email, date, title, summary, key_points, tags, topic)
Manual import + test run documented in artefacts/task-009/deploy-notes.md
workflow JSON validates: python3 -m json.tool workflows/gmail-capture.json
mvp_template.security_arch_impact: Medium — Gmail OAuth credentials stored in n8n credential store; no secrets in workflow JSON; Claude API key via n8n env var
mvp_template.tests_required: JSON validation; manual import test on Pi4; dry-run with fixture email payload
mvp_template.rollback_plan: Delete workflow from n8n UI — no vault writes occur until workflow is active and triggered
mvp_template.privacy_dpia: Yes — email content is personal data; processed locally on Pi4, not sent to external services beyond Claude API; Gmail OAuth scoped to read-only
prerequisites: n8n running on Pi4 with Gmail OAuth credential configured
Obsidian vault mounted at /opt/obsidian-vault on Pi4

tasks.title: PM: Laptop backlog and Pensieve capture mechanism
notes: Demo priority — implement for demo purposes

mvp_template.doel: Enable capturing backlog items and Pensieve notes from a laptop (browser bookmarklet, CLI script, or email) so that captures are not limited to Telegram/phone.
acceptatiecriteria: At least one capture path implemented: browser bookmarklet OR CLI script OR email-to-backlog
Captured items land in tasks/telegram-inbox.md (backlog items) or Obsidian vault (Pensieve notes) via GitHub API commit — same path as Telegram captures
Capture includes: title, source URL (if applicable), date, type (backlog or pensieve)
deploy-notes.md documents how to set up and use the capture mechanism on a laptop
Works without requiring Claude Code or SSH access from the laptop
mvp_template.security_arch_impact: Low-medium — GitHub API token required for commit; token scoped to repo write only; no secrets stored client-side beyond token
mvp_template.tests_required: End-to-end test: capture an item from laptop, verify it appears in telegram-inbox.md or vault
definition_of_done: capture mechanism deployed and tested end-to-end
mvp_template.rollback_plan: Delete artefact; revoke GitHub token if bookmarklet/CLI was distributed
mvp_template.privacy_dpia: No — captures are personal notes, no third-party personal data
prerequisites: GitHub PAT with repo write scope

tasks.title: PM: Human-gated improvement proposals to YAML/CLAUDE.md (S-002-4)
notes: MVP2 closeout — required before further MVP3 expansion

mvp_template.doel: After each pipeline run, SelfImprover produces concrete improvement proposals (CLAUDE.md updates, agent YAML changes); a human must explicitly approve each proposal before it is written.
acceptatiecriteria: SelfImprover appends proposals to artefacts/<task-id>/improvement_proposals.md after each run
Each proposal has: target file, proposed change (diff or description), rationale
PM presents proposals to user at end of session with clear approve/reject prompt
Only approved proposals are applied; rejected proposals logged with reason
CLAUDE.md updated to document this human-gate workflow step
mvp_template.security_arch_impact: Low — no automated writes to CLAUDE.md or agent YAMLs without explicit approval
mvp_template.tests_required: Fixture run: SelfImprover produces a proposal; simulate approve + verify file updated; simulate reject + verify file unchanged
mvp_template.rollback_plan: Revert CLAUDE.md change via git; no agent YAML changes unless explicitly approved

tasks.title: PM: PM reads lessons.md at session start (S-002-3)
notes: MVP2 closeout — required before further MVP3 expansion

mvp_template.doel: Update the PM session workflow so that tasks/lessons.md is read at the start of every session and the top lessons inform task planning and agent decisions.
acceptatiecriteria: CLAUDE.md updated: 'Session start' section adds lessons.md read as mandatory step (after telegram inbox, before backlog review)
PM surfaces the 3 most recent lessons as context when planning new tasks
lessons.md format documented (if not already) so future SelfImprover runs append correctly
mvp_template.security_arch_impact: None — read-only change to workflow documentation
mvp_template.tests_required: Review CLAUDE.md diff; manually verify lessons.md is consulted in next PM session

tasks.title: pensieve: Retroactive vault quality improvement script

mvp_template.doel: Build a Python script that retroactively improves existing Obsidian vault notes: migrates old-format notes to YAML frontmatter, normalises tags, re-enriches non-LinkedIn URL captures via Claude API, and flags unresolvable captures with a needs-review tag.
niet_in_scope: modifying the folder structure of existing notes (covered by task-004 going forward)
acceptatiecriteria: Migrates old-format notes (# heading + **bold** fields + #hashtag tags) to YAML frontmatter matching the current template
Normalises concatenated tags to hyphenated lowercase (e.g. aiagents → ai-agents)
For source:link notes with non-LinkedIn URLs: fetches page content (requests + BeautifulSoup), re-calls Claude API with improved prompt, rewrites summary/key_points/tags
For LinkedIn or unresolvable URLs: adds needs-review tag without modifying existing content
Supports --dry-run flag that prints planned changes without writing files
Passes pylint / flake8 with no errors
Script runs on Pi 4 via: ssh pi4 python3 /tmp/migrate-vault.py --vault /opt/obsidian-vault [--dry-run]
mvp_template.security_arch_impact: Low — reads/writes local vault files; Claude API key passed via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var, never hardcoded; URL fetching uses requests with 10s timeout and no redirect to private IPs
mvp_template.tests_required: Unit tests with fixture notes covering: old-format migration, tag normalisation, LinkedIn detection, dry-run mode
definition_of_done: test_report.md contains PASS with >=90% pass rate
mvp_template.rollback_plan: Script makes in-place edits — run with --dry-run first; vault is synced to OneDrive so files can be restored from OneDrive version history if needed
mvp_template.privacy_dpia: No — notes are personal knowledge captures, no third-party personal data
mvp_template.cost_estimate: EUR 0.01 (Claude API calls for URL re-enrichment of ~5-10 existing URL notes)

tasks.title: pensieve: Improved captures — richer summaries, better tagging, topic folders

mvp_template.doel: Update the Pensieve Telegram capture workflow to produce richer summaries (5-7 key_points + analysis field), improved tagging (4-8 tags including domain/entity/action types), and topic-based folder structure (Category/Topic/filename.md).
niet_in_scope: changing the Claude model from Haiku
acceptatiecriteria: Claude API prompt updated: key_points expanded to 5-7 items (max 25 words each), new analysis field (2-3 sentences: thesis, argument, implication)
Tags expanded to 4-8 items; prompt instructs domain tags, entity tags, and action tags (e.g. follow-up, implement, read-deeper)
Claude response schema includes new topic field (single lowercase slug word, e.g. ai, sap, homelab, productivity)
Build Markdown Note node updated: folder path is Category/Topic/filename.md (e.g. Research/AI/2026-04-05-title.md)
Parse Claude Response node validates new fields (analysis string, topic slug format)
workflow JSON validates: python3 -m json.tool workflows/telegram-capture.json
prompts/claude-processor.txt and templates/note-template.md updated to reflect new schema
mvp_template.security_arch_impact: None — same Claude API call, same vault write path; topic slug validated against [a-z0-9-]+ before use in path construction
mvp_template.tests_required: Manual import test in n8n; fixture-based unit test of Parse Claude Response and Build Markdown Note JS logic; validate JSON
mvp_template.rollback_plan: git revert in pensieve repo — workflow JSON is version-controlled; re-import previous version in n8n
mvp_template.privacy_dpia: No — no change to data handling

tasks.title: CCAS: Merge feature/hana-os-users into ccas-jenkins develop

mvp_template.doel: Merge the feature/hana-os-users branch in ccas-jenkins into develop, resolving any conflicts, and verify the Jenkinsfile-HANA-OS-Users pipeline is present on develop.
niet_in_scope: running the Jenkins pipeline against live HANA hosts
acceptatiecriteria: feature/hana-os-users merged to ccas-jenkins develop with no conflicts
Jenkinsfile-HANA-OS-Users and README-HANA-OS-Users.md present on ccas-jenkins develop
ccas-jenkins develop pushed to remote
mvp_template.security_arch_impact: None — merge only, no new code introduced
mvp_template.tests_required: git log verify merge commit present; ls verify pipeline files present on develop
mvp_template.rollback_plan: git revert merge commit on ccas-jenkins develop

mvp_template.doel: Build a bash script that reads logs/audit.jsonl and prints a summary of agent actions grouped by agent name and action type.
acceptatiecriteria: Script exits 0 and prints action counts grouped by agent
Handles missing or empty audit.jsonl gracefully (zero counts, no errors)
Passes bash -n and shellcheck with no warnings
mvp_template.security_arch_impact: None — read-only, no secrets, no network calls
mvp_template.tests_required: bash -n; shellcheck; run with missing file; run with empty file; run with seeded fixture
definition_of_done: test_report.md contains PASS with >=90% pass rate
mvp_template.rollback_plan: Delete artefacts/task-002/ — no system state changed

mvp_template.doel: Build a bash script that reads queue.json and prints a task count summary grouped by status.
acceptatiecriteria: Script exits 0 and prints counts for all 6 statuses (pending, in_progress, paused, review, test, done)
Handles empty queue gracefully (zero counts, no errors)
Passes bash -n and shellcheck with no warnings
mvp_template.security_arch_impact: None — read-only, no secrets, no network calls
mvp_template.tests_required: bash -n; shellcheck; run with empty queue.json; run with seeded queue.json
definition_of_done: test_report.md contains PASS with >=90% pass rate
mvp_template.rollback_plan: Delete artefacts/task-001/ — no system state changed
